title: Chicken Shawarma Wrap
description: A delicious and easy-to-make wrap filled with marinated chicken, topped with vegetables and served in a warm flatbread.
instructions: In a small bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, and Mediterranean seasoning.
Add the chicken to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes, or up to 2 hours in the refrigerator.
Grill the chicken for 5-6 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 165°F.
Warm the flatbread by wrapping it in foil and heating it in the oven for 5 minutes.
Assemble the shawarma wrap by slicing the grilled chicken and placing it on the flatbread.
Add chopped cucumber, tomato, and red onion on top of the chicken.
Drizzle with additional olive oil and lemon juice if desired.
